note: FPR denominator added per roadmap A2. Benign-phase events = agent-processed events in [first_attack-120s, first_attack). Source: results/archive_20260610/{events,ground_truth,alerts}.jsonl (events/gt/alerts timestamp-aligned, verified 2026-06-17).
interpretation: 0 false positives over 79 benign events. 95% CI [0, 3.8%] (rule of three). The CI upper bound is LOOSE because N is small; to substantiate an 'FPR < 1%' claim, N>=300 benign events are required -> see roadmap B4 (extended benign volume).
